name: The Calile Hotel Brisbane
description: Official Site. Located in the James Street lifestyle Precinct, only a 10 minute drive to Brisbane CBD. With beautiful hotel rooms outdoor swimming pool, poolside cabanas, restaurants and bars
pet_policy: Contact the hotel for its pet policy

faqs.question: Is parking available at the hotel?
faqs.answer:
The Calile Hotel secure car park is available to access from 6:00AM – 12:00AM daily with the entrance through Ada Lane via Wandoo Street. The carpark has a maximum entrance height of 2.3 metres. Parking is $40.00/day for guests staying at The Calile, tickets can be validated at reception by Guest Services.

Valet parking is available for $60.00 per day via our porte-cochère, entrance via Doggett Street.

Parking can be booked online as an add-on when booking accommodation via our website.

faqs.question: What are the children policies and age restrictions at The Calile?
faqs.answer: Guests under the age of 18 must be accompanied by an adult to check-in and stay at The Calile. Our guest rooms can accommodate one child under the age of 12 years using existing bedding at no additional charge with a parent or guardian. Children must be accompanied by an adult in the gym, public and pool areas at all times. Read more about our children’s policy here.

faqs.question: What should I know about hotel check-in and check-out at The Calile Hotel?
faqs.answer:
Hotel check-in is at 2:00PM and check-out before 11:00AM.  If you require a late checkout or early check-in, please discuss your requirements with Guest Services either prior to arrival or when checking in. Whilst our team will accommodate wherever possible, please note requests are subject to availability.

Please be advised that use of the facilities including the pool is available only whilst checked-in to your room and not prior to check-in or following check-out.

To complete check in on arrival, you will need a valid photo ID and a credit card. We place a temporary pre-authorisation of $100.00 per night for incidentals upon check in. Please also note that The Calile Hotel is a cashless venue.

The hotel provides luggage storage for hotel guests pre or post-stay at no extra charge. Our reception is available to assist you 24 hours a day.

faqs.question: What dining options are available at The Calile Hotel?
faqs.answer:
The hotel has four on-site restaurants and bars – Lobby Bar (ground level), Hellenika (poolside), Sushi Room (ground level) and SK Steak and Oyster on Ada Lane. For more information on opening hours, please click here.

Adjacent to the hotel is recently opened Ada Lane, consisting of; sAme sAme, Land Of Smiles bar, Bianca, Gelato Messina and Jocelyn's Provisions. There are also a range of exquisite bars and restaurants within walking distance on James Street and surrounding suburbs. Discover more jamesst.com.au/food-drink.

faqs.question: What are the transportation options available to get to The Calile Hotel?
faqs.answer:
TAXI/UBER - A taxi or Uber to or from Brisbane Airport to The Calile will cost approximately $35.00 subject to traffic conditions.

PRIVATE CAR - Arranging a private transfer to or from Brisbane Domestic or International Airport will cost approximately $79.00 each way. Contact concierge to book here.

TRAIN - From Brisbane Airport – Take the Airtrain to Fortitude Valley station, this journey is approximately 40 minutes in duration and fares start from $18.00 one-way. The hotel is located one kilometre and a short ten-minute walk from Fortitude Valley station.

From the Gold Coast – Take the Brisbane Airport train travelling north to Fortitude Valley station. Fares begin at $13.30 one-way. The hotel is located one kilometre and a short ten-minute walk from Fortitude Valley station.

BUS - James Street near Robertson Street Stop 8A is situated adjacent to the entrance to the hotel. The bus has a set route, including Brisbane city and inner suburbs such as Teneriffe, Toowong, Auchenflower, Milton and Petrie Terrace.

faqs.question: Is parking available at the hotel?
faqs.answer:
Parking options for Vibe Hotel Subiaco Guests.

• Undercover Hotel car parking:
A limited number of underground car parks are available below the Hotel precinct.  Located on Basement Level 2. These bays are subject to availability, charged at $25 per 24 hours. 

Multiple entries & exits are permitted in a 24 hour period. Height restrictions are in place, maximum vehicle height is 2.0 metres. Once you have completed your check-in, access is via the main entrance off Alvan Street.

The hotel is not able to provide guaranteed parking for vehicles above 2.0 meters. 

Alternative options (including over-sized vehicles):

• City of Subiaco public car park:
Located below the Hotel on Basement Level 1. These bays are payable via ticket kiosks within the car park. Suitable for larger vehicles. Entry available from 6am until 11pm, via the main entrance off Alvan Street.

• Street parking:
Available on Railway Road. Ticket kiosks are in place and fees payable on weekdays only, between 8am and 5pm. Parking is free of charge after 5pm on weekdays and all day on weekends and public holidays.
